author: Dr. Lizard
title: How quickly does CMV viral load escalate once reactivation begins after HSCT?
answer: CMV viral load can progress from 250 to 1000 IU/mL in just 4 days median.
detail: Rapid escalation occurs after exceeding 250 IU/mL.
Viral doubling time under 2 days predicts need for treatment.
releaseNote: CMV viral load can escalate rapidly after HSCT, with a median increase from 250 to 1000 IU/mL in just 4 days. Rapid escalation and viral doubling time under 2 days may indicate the need for treatment.
